 const readJson = async <T>(path: string, fallback: T): Promise<T> => {   try {     return (await Bun.file(path).json()) as T;   } catch {     return fallback;   } };  const currentPattern = async (): Promise<string> => {   if (!existsSync(CURRENT_TASK_PATH)) return "unknown"; };  const loadConfig = async () => {   config = await readJson<WorkerConfig>(CONFIG_PATH, {     db_pool_size: 10,     db_write_delay_ms: 0,   }); };  const estimatedProcessingRate = (): number => {   const unitCostMs = Math.max(50, config.db_write_delay_ms + 120);
